title: veronica treadwellii
intro: Veronica treadwellii, also known as Veronica cordifolia, is a flowering plant in the plantain family, native to Australia. The leaves and stems of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Veronica treadwellii include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Veronica treadwellii can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
